⚠️ **This type is _unstable_ and may change significantly in a way that the data won't be backwards compatible.**
A time-windowed 3D trail built from logged points.

## Fields
### Required
* `point`: [`Trail3DPoint`](../components/trail3d_point.md)

### Recommended
* `color`: [`Trail3DColor`](../components/trail3d_color.md)
* `radius`: [`Radius`](../components/radius.md)
* `length`: [`Trail3DLength`](../components/trail3d_length.md)

### Optional
* `magnitude`: [`Trail3DMagnitude`](../components/trail3d_magnitude.md)
* `magnitude_range`: [`Trail3DMagnitudeRange`](../components/trail3d_magnitude_range.md)
